title: CNBC Daily Open: AI demand fuels investors' portfolios while oil posts biggest monthly decline
summary_full: The tech space continues to be fueled by rising artificial intelligence demand, with investors piling their portfolios in the technology, while Amazon Web Services dabbles with Forward Deployed Engineering units to better compete with  OpenAI and Anthropic.
